title: ⚠️ Facebook CPC Rising
body: CPC has increased from $0.24 to $0.44 — consider refreshing ad creative.

title: ⚠️ Private Events Close Rate: 32.4%
body: 46% of lost leads went unresponsive. Faster follow-up (within 1hr) could significantly improve close rate.

title: 📌 Organic Baseline: ~3,451 covers/mo
body: Based on 2 months with zero ad spend. All covers above this are ad-driven.

title: 💡 Only 12.4% of guests opt into marketing
body: With 30,236 reservation records, there's a large untapped email audience.

title: 📅 Monday Is Nearly Unused
body: Only 33 Monday reservations recorded. Consider closing Mondays or dedicating them to private events/buyouts.
